html:
<style>
.ci-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);min-width:76px;margin-top:3px;flex-shrink:0}
.ci-val{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;font-weight:300}
.ci-val strong{color:var(--white);font-weight:500}
.cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bg);background:var(--gold);padding:17px 34px;border-radius:2px;margin-top:34px;transition:background .2s}
.cta:hover{background:var(--gold2)}
.social{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:18px}
.social a{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:8px 16px;letter-spacing:.12em;transition:all .2s}
.social a:hover{color:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.ct-r{position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.ct-r img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.2) saturate(.5);position:absolute;inset:0}
.ct-r-body{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:64px 48px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(240,247,252,.95) 0%,transparent 100%)}
@media(max-width:820px){.ct-r{padding:40px 24px!important}.ct-r img{display:none}}

footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:0}
.ft-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--border)}
@media(max-width:820px){.ft-top{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:480px){.ft-top{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.ft-col{background:var(--bg2);padding:36px 32px}
.ft-brand{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px}
.ft-desc{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75}
.ft-head{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px}
.ft-item{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;padding:2px 0}
.ft-bottom{padding:20px 64px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
@media(max-width:560px){.ft-bottom{padding:18px 20px;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}}
.ft-c{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.ft-b{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold)}

.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:none}


#toast-container{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;pointer-events:none}
.toast{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:14px 20px;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;max-width:340px;pointer-events:auto;animation:slideIn .3s ease;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}
.toast.success{border-left:3px solid #4ade80}.toast.error{border-left:3px solid #f87171}
.toast-x{margin-left:auto;cursor:pointer;opacity:.5;padding-left:8px}.toast-x:hover{opacity:1}
@keyframes slideIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:5000;background:rgba(26,42,58,.6);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
.modal{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;width:100%;max-width:620px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:translateY(24px);transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}
.modal-overlay.open .modal{transform:none}
.modal-head{padding:24px 32px 18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2)}
.modal-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:400}.modal-close{font-size:24px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;line-height:1;padding:0}.modal-close:hover{color:var(--white)}
.modal-body{padding:28px 32px 32px}
.frow{margin-bottom:18px}.frow label{display:block;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}
.frow input,.frow textarea,.frow select{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:13px 15px;font-size:14px;border-radius:6px;transition:border .2s,box-shadow .2s;outline:none;font-family:inherit}
.frow input:focus,.frow textarea:focus,.frow select:focus{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--bg);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(163,138,31,.12)}
.frow textarea{min-height:96px;resize:vertical}.frow select option{background:var(--bg2)}
.fgrid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}
@media(max-width:480px){.fgrid2{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.frow-ck{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:8px 0}
.frow-ck input{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:20px;height:20px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;flex-shrink:0;margin:0 8px 0 0;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg)}
.frow-ck input:checked{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.frow-ck input:checked::after{content:'\2713';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;line-height:1}
.frow-ck span{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.4}
.fcat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:10px}
.fcat-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding-left:12px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:border .2s,background .2s,box-shadow .2s;position:relative}
.fcat-item:hover{background:rgba(163,138,31,.05);border-color:rgba(163,138,31,.3)}
.fcat-item input[type="checkbox"]{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:20px;height:20px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;flex-shrink:0;margin:0 8px 0 0;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:all .2s;background:var(--bg)}
.fcat-item input[type="checkbox"]:checked{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.fcat-item input[type="checkbox"]:checked::after{content:'\2713';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;line-height:1}
.fcat-item.checked{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(163,138,31,.08);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--gold)}
.fcat-item span{font-size:13px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.3;font-weight:500}
.btn-sub{width:100%;background:var(--gold);color:#FFFFFF;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:16px;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .15s;font-family:inherit;margin-top:12px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(163,138,31,.25)}
.btn-sub:hover{background:var(--gold2)}.btn-sub:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
.ferr{font-size:11px;color:#f87171;margin-top:4px;display:none}
#sbar{position:sticky;top:64px;z-index:100;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:11px 64px;display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
@media(max-width:820px){#sbar{padding:10px 14px;flex-wrap:wrap}}
#sinput{flex:1;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--white);padding:9px 13px;font-size:13px;border-radius:3px;outline:none;transition:border .2s;font-family:inherit;min-width:160px}
#sinput:focus{border-color:var(--gold)}#sinput::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
.fbtn{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;font-family:inherit}
.fbtn:hover,.fbtn.active{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,175,55,.08)}
#sres{display:none;position:absolute;top:100%;left:64px;right:64px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;max-height:340px;overflow-y:auto;z-index:200}
@media(max-width:820px){#sres{left:8px;right:8px}}
.sri{padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
.sri:hover{background:var(--bg3)}.sri:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sri-img{width:36px;height:36px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:2px;filter:brightness(.8);flex-shrink:0}
.sri-name{font-size:12px;color:var(--white)}.sri-cat{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px}
.sri-id{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px}.sri-none{padding:14px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
#qfloat{position:fixed;bottom:26px;right:26px;z-index:4000;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:var(--gold);color:#FFFFFF;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:12px 18px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:inherit;transition:background .2s,transform .2s;box-shadow:0 6px 26px rgba(212,175,55,.3)}
#qfloat:hover{background:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
@media(max-width:480px){#qfloat span{display:none}#qfloat{padding:12px}}
@keyframes spin2{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.btn-sub.loading::after{content:'';display:inline-block;width:11px;height:11px;border:2px solid var(--bg);border-top-color:transparent;border-radius:50%;animation:spin2 .6s linear infinite;margin-left:9px;vertical-align:middle}


/* ── Scroll progress bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#scroll-progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);width:0%;z-index:10000;transition:width .1s linear;pointer-events:none}

/* ── Back to top ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#back-top{position:fixed;bottom:26px;left:26px;z-index:4000;width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--gold);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .2s;font-size:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
#back-top.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
#back-top:hover{background:var(--bg3);transform:translateY(-2px)}

/* ── WhatsApp float ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#wafloat{position:fixed;bottom:82px;right:26px;z-index:4000;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:#25D366;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(37,211,102,.35);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
#wafloat:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.5)}
@media(max-width:480px){#wafloat{bottom:74px;right:16px}}

/* ── Product badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-badges{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.bdg{font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:2px}
.bdg-haccp{background:rgba(94,206,160,.18);color:#5ecea0;border:1px solid rgba(94,206,160,.35)}
.bdg-eco{background:rgba(101,188,98,.12);color:#7dd87a;border:1px solid rgba(101,188,98,.28)}

/* ── Card add button ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pc-add{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--gold);font-size:15px;font-weight:300;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;z-index:3;font-family:inherit;line-height:1;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}
.pc:hover .pc-add,.pc-add.added{opacity:1}
.pc-add:hover{background:rgba(212,175,55,.15);border-color:var(--gold)}
.pc-add.added{background:rgba(212,175,55,.15);border-color:var(--gold);font-size:12px}

/* ── Skeleton loader ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sk-item{padding:11px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
.sk-thumb{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.sk-lines{flex:1}
.sk-l{height:9px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}
.sk-l:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.sk-thumb,.sk-l{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(167,216,245,.1) 25%,rgba(167,216,245,.2) 50%,rgba(167,216,245,.1) 75%);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:200% 0}100%{background-position:-200% 0}}

/* ── Empty search state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sri-empty{padding:26px 16px;text-align:center}
.sri-empty svg{opacity:.3;display:block;margin:0 auto 12px}
.sri-empty p{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7}
.sri-empty span{color:var(--gold)}

/* ── Subcategory pills ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#sub-pills{background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;white-space:nowrap;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;display:none}
#sub-pills::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
#sub-pills.open{display:block;padding:8px 64px}
@media(max-width:820px){#sub-pills.open{padding:8px 14px}}
.spill{display:inline-block;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;margin-right:5px}
.spill:hover,.spill.active{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(212,175,55,.06)}

/* ── Sort select ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
#ssort{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none}
#ssort:hover,#ssort:focus{border-color:rgba(212,175,55,.5);color:var(--gold);outline:none}
#ssort option{background:var(--bg2);color:var(--white)}

/* ── Product detail modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-lg{max-width:680px}
.dm-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr}
@media(max-width:560px){.dm-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.dm-img{width:100%;height:260px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.78) saturate(.8);display:block}
.dm-noimg{width:100%;height:260px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:48px;opacity:.4}
@media(max-width:560px){.dm-img,.dm-noimg{height:180px}}
.dm-info{padding:22px 24px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:65vh}
.dm-code{font-size:8px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}</style>
